positive: A detailed botanical illustration featuring whimsical forest mushrooms, glowing fireflies, and deep emerald ferns, rendered in the style of vintage scientific etching mixed with delicate watercolor washes. Highly aesthetic, natural light, deep contrast, perfect for a print.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, modern plastic, digital noise, harsh colors, photorealism
